zh.lifeSummary: Agnes De Tyckenhall是Radulphus De Tyckenhall的女兒，於1248年出生在英國德比夏爾迪可納爾。她於1265年與William de Franceis II在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國德比夏爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes De Tyckenhall是Radulphus De Tyckenhall的女儿，于1248年出生在英国德比夏爾迪可納爾。她于1265年与William de Franceis II在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes De Tyckenhall was born in 1248, in Ticknall, Derbyshire, England as the daughter of Radulphus De Tyckenhall. She married William de Franceis II in 1265, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes De Tyckenhall est née en 1248, à Ticknall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, fille de Radulphus De Tyckenhall. Elle a épousé William de Franceis II en 1265, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes De Tyckenhall wurde 1248 in Ticknall, Derbyshire, England, als Tochter von Radulphus De Tyckenhall geboren. Sie hat 1265 in Derbyshire, England William de Franceis II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes De Tyckenhall è nata il nel 1248 nel Ticknall, Derbyshire, England come figlia di Radulphus De Tyckenhall. Lei sposato William de Franceis II nel 1265, nel Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes De Tyckenhallは1248年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアティクナルでRadulphus De Tyckenhallの娘として生まれた。1265年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでWilliam de Franceis IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスデルブイシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes De Tyckenhall(은)는 1248년 영국 더비실르 티c널에서 Radulphus De Tyckenhall의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1265년 영국 더비실르에서 William de Franceis II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 더비실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes De Tyckenhall nasceu em 1248, em Ticknall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra filha de Radulphus De Tyckenhall. Ela casou-se com William de Franceis II em 1265, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes De Tyckenhall родилась в 1248 г. в местности тиккналл, дирбишир, Англия. Её отца звали Radulphus De Tyckenhall. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Franceis II в 1265 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes De Tyckenhall nació en 1248, en Ticknall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra como hija de Radulphus De Tyckenhall. Se casó con William de Franceis II en 1265, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
